user.title: Connect to OW-SERVER
user.description: Enter the connection details for your EDS OW-SERVER.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the OW-SERVER. Check the host and port.
error.invalid_xml: Invalid response from OW-SERVER. Check if the device is an OW-SERVER.
error.no_devices: No 1-Wire devices found on the OW-SERVER.
error.timeout: Connection timed out. Check the host and port.
